name: Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry cereals to make 5 cups and add the pretzel sticks.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the apple juice, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and onion powder.
3. Toss the liquid mixture with the dry cereal mixture until evenly coated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a shallow non-stick baking pan.
5. Bake at 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, stirring every 10 minutes to ensure even cooking.
6. Allow the mix to cool before serving.
Serves 8. Approximately 90 calories per serving.
